name: Paldea Evolved Pokemon Center Elite Trainer Box (Exclusive)
extCardText:
Command a Rousing Performance!
Energy surges as new powers awaken and perilous legends are revealed! First partners Meowscarada ex, Skeledirge ex, and Quaquaval ex have evolved to take the stage with mesmerizing magic, song, and dance. Meanwhile, Forretress, Slowking, and Dedenne shine as Tera Pokémon ex, and Chien-Pao ex, Ting-Lu ex, and others bring daunting strengths requiring courage to command. Even Pikachu joins the Pokémon ex party in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Paldea Evolved expansion

The Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Paldea Evolved Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box includes:
• 11 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Paldea Evolved booster packs
• Each booster pack contains 10 cards and 1 Basic Energy. Cards vary by pack.
• 1 full-art foil promo card featuring Pikachu with a Pokémon Center logo
• 1 full-art foil promo card featuring Pikachu
• 65 card sleeves featuring Sprigatito, Fuecoco, and Quaxly
• 45 Pokémon TCG Energy cards
• A player’s guide to the Scarlet & Violet—Paldea Evolved expansion
• 6 damage-counter dice
• 1 competition-legal coin-flip die
• 2 plastic condition markers
• A collector’s box to hold everything, with 4 dividers to keep it organized
• A code card for Pokémon Trading Card Game Live

name: Paldea Evolved Sleeved Booster Pack Art Bundle [Set of 5]
extCardText:
Command a Rousing Performance!
Energy surges as new powers awaken and perilous legends are revealed! First partners Meowscarada ex, Skeledirge ex, and Quaquaval ex have evolved to take the stage with mesmerizing magic, song, and dance. Meanwhile, Forretress, Slowking, and Dedenne shine as Tera Pokémon ex, and Chien-Pao ex, Ting-Lu ex, and others bring daunting strengths requiring courage to command. Even Pikachu joins the Pokémon ex party in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Paldea Evolved expansion

Collect each of the 5 unique art packs for Paldea Evolved.
Each Paldea Evolved booster pack contains 10 random cards.
